subject: I've got a new book
body:
Hey, Alex here.

$100M Money Models - my new book - is coming out on Aug 16th, 2025. Register for the free live book launch extravaganza PLUS preorder your copy here.

I started writing this when I was preparing for my first big exit (in 2020). I wanted to crystallize all my highest ROI "money models" in one place.

Once I had all my money models in one place, I ended up using them all the time. It became my most used asset for growing companies.

I reference it so regularly because a money model is a series of offers deliberately structured to generate the most cash up front, get the most leads, and get the highest lifetime value.

Simply put - a well-designed money model gets more customers, to spend more money, faster, again and again.

They are offer sequences - that when combined are so profitable - they are responsible for the vast majority of my material success. Nothing else comes close.

That's when I realized all these money models could actually be organized into a single coherent, and unbelievably powerful 'cookbook' anyone could follow.

$100M Money Models is my crowning achievement. Of all the content I've made, this book will teach you the most.

I've been slaving away on this book in secret for over 4 years.

If you are an aspiring entrepreneur and business owner, this book shows how to win.

It's finally here. It's about to get real.

Alex

THE BIGGEST PS OF ALL TIME - btw…this launch took an extra year because I've also got something huge to give everyone. I can't tell you what it is, but I can tell you it's better than an NFT but less than a Bitcoin and every single person who shows up live gets one. More to follow…
